hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *xcuserdata/*|*.xcuserstate|*.pbxuser) echo 'Blocked: Xcode user-state files are gitignored and must not be edited.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.swift) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; out=$(xcrun swiftc -parse "$f" 2>&1); [ -z "$out" ] && exit 0; echo "swiftc -parse reported issues in $f:" >&2; echo "$out" | head -20 >&2; exit 2
